nodalDepartmentName.label: Department Of Woman Empowerment & Child Development

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund" was launched by the Department of Women Empowerment and Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants of the state upon attaining the superannuation age of 60 years.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - A minimum amount of ₹30,000/- will be provided. - Upon completing 20 years of service, ₹1,30,000/- will be provided. **Note**: There is a provision for a 5% annual increase on the deposited amount.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Anganwadi workers, mini workers, and assistants of the state upon attaining the superannuation age of 60 years. A minimum amount of ₹30,000/- is granted, while those completing 20 years of service receive ₹1,30,000/-.

children.text: The scheme "Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund" was launched by the Department of Women Empowerment and Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants of the state upon attaining the superannuation age of 60 years.
A minimum amount of ₹30,000/- will be provided.
Upon completing 20 years of service, ₹1,30,000/- will be provided.
: There is a provision for a 5% annual increase on the deposited amount.
To receive the amount under the Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund, Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants must apply at the concerned CDPO office.
A retirement certificate from the Anganwadi Centre, Aadhar card, and bank account details must be attached with the application.

applicationProcess.process_md: To receive the amount under the Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund, Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants must apply at the concerned CDPO office. A retirement certificate from the Anganwadi Centre, Aadhar card, and bank account details must be attached with the application.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must be an Anganwadi woman worker/mini worker/assistant working on an honorarium basis. 1. The applicant must have completed 60 years of age.

children.text: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be an Anganwadi woman worker/mini worker/assistant working on an honorarium basis.
The applicant must have completed 60 years of age.
